heading: Add an API (Application Programming Interface) Access List Entry for the API (Application Programming Interface) Key
body:
To create an IP access list entry for your API key using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas organizations apiKeys accessLists create [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas organizations apiKeys accessLists create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-organizations-apiKeys-accessLists-create).
